construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure personal agency and optimism about the future, but p24 measures retrospective life satisfaction rather than forward-looking efficacy or control.

items.reason: Directly measures perceived ability to secure economic future, a core component of personal efficacy and optimism about life outcomes.
Directly measures confidence in achieving future goals and projects, a central element of personal agency and optimism.
Measures retrospective satisfaction with past life rather than forward-looking sense of control, efficacy, or optimism about future outcomes.
Directly measures perceived control over a specific life domain (economic situation), a core indicator of personal agency.
